summary: The diff implements REQ-1 fully. A new WelcomeGate component was added, App.tsx was updated to show the gate before LoveLetterPage, and index.css was extended with gate-specific keyframe animations and styles. All acceptance criteria appear to be met: full-screen overlay, 'Welcome Cutee' button, state-based gate/content switching, dark romantic styling with gold/maroon accents, and fade animation on entry/exit.
